title: Wave 16 - Manager parity foundation (auth + portfolio real data)
description: Coordinate Wave 16 to replace manager mock flows with production-aligned behavior: stable auth/session contract, real dashboard/list data, and regression coverage.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 16 tickets are defined for architect/backend/mobile/qa with dependency order
